creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Greetings,
 Please consider this matter closed.
Upon further investigation, I was able to determine the cause, and install w/o issue.
It turned out to be an issue with ports-mgmt/portmaster, libtool was unable to keep
up with the tasks imposed, and in the manner portmaster imposed them.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
